description_long: This kiosk features a striking geometric facade with bold black, white, and gray patterns, including stripes, triangles, and diagonal motifs. The front is dominated by a large, rectangular window with the text 'duyek design' and additional signage, suggesting a modern, design-focused business. The structure is composed of two main boxy volumes, with the upper section projecting outward above the entrance, creating a sheltered area. The roof is flat and decorated with a repeating pattern of raised triangular elements, adding visual interest and a contemporary flair. The side and rear panels continue the geometric theme, with alternating vertical stripes and angular shapes. The overall appearance is sleek, modern, and visually dynamic, making it a standout feature in any urban environment.
description: A modern kiosk with bold black, white, and gray geometric patterns, featuring a large front window and striking angular designs. The structure is boxy, with a flat patterned roof and prominent signage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large window with 'duyek design' signage, the main entrance area, and the geometric facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vertical striped pattern on the main body and the projecting upper section with angular designs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuation of geometric patterns, with a focus on triangles and a less prominent window area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the striped main body and the angular, patterned upper section, with no visible signage.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign integrated above the entrance window, displaying 'duyek design' and additional text
attribute_window_presence: one large rectangular window at the front
attribute_door_configuration: single door located beneath the front window
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with raised triangular decorative elements, finished in patterned black and white
attribute_architectural_style: modern with geometric and minimalist influences
